title: Devashappath Khote Sangen
original_title: देवा शप्पथ खोटं सांगेन खरं सांगणार नाही
overview: 'Chandu' an unemployed stage actor lies to his beloved wife to be an MBA student working in a Multinational Company. Under instructions from his mentor, he gets a job as a Sales Manager by falsely representing himself as a son from a rich family living in South Africa; now on a short visit to India. Hilarious situations arise when his boss plans to meet his parents.
